summary: Completed testing for Iteration 27 - Cancel 1688 Purchase Feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend cancel button working correctly with confirmation dialog and toast notification.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/orders/{order_id}/cancel-purchase endpoint correctly unlinks 1688 order from Shopify order
Endpoint sets alibaba_order_id to null and purchase_status_1688 to 'not_purchased'
Endpoint stores cancelled purchase info in cancelled_purchases array for audit trail
Frontend Cancel 1688 Purchase button (red X icon) appears only on order cards with alibaba_order_id
Clicking cancel button shows browser confirmation dialog with order number and 1688 order ID
After cancel, order refreshes and no longer shows 1688 order ID
seed_data_creation: None - used existing orders with alibaba_order_id (29483, 29477, 29534, 29369)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 tested Cancel 1688 Purchase feature. Key endpoint: POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/orders/{order_id}/cancel-purchase. Frontend button has data-testid='cancel-1688-purchase-btn' and only appears on orders with alibaba_order_id. Orders 29483 and 29477 had their purchases cancelled during testing. Remaining orders with alibaba_order_id: 29534, 29369.

confirmation_dialog.message_format:
Are you sure you want to cancel the 1688 purchase for Order #{order_number}?

This will unlink the 1688 order ID: {alibaba_order_id}
